serviceDescription: WorkSpaces Pools offers non-persistent virtual desktops, tailored for users who need access to highly-curated desktop environments hosted on ephemeral infrastructure.

components.label: Number of users per month
components.description: Total number of unique users launching WorkSpaces Pools in a month.

components.label: Number of working hours per day
components.description: The maximum number of hours per day that WorkSpaces Pools may be used.

components.label: Buffer capacity as % of concurrency
components.description: Specify the percent of concurrency to maintain as buffer capacity. Buffer capacity ensures new users have an instance available.

components.label: Days in week
components.description: Number of working days in a week.

components.label: Peak duration (hours) per day
components.description: Number of peak hours in a day.

components.header: 'Peak duration (hours) per day' can't exceed 'Number of working hours per day'.
components.label: Peak duration exceed working hours alert

triggerComponent.variableLabel: difference between working hours and peak duration (weekday)

subComponents.variableLabel: Peak duration exceed working hours alert

components.label: Average off-peak concurrent users per hour
components.description: Number of concurrent users during off-peak hours.

components.label: info alert
components.content: Number of concurrent users cannot be greater than total number of users per month.

components.label: Average peak concurrent users per hour
components.description: Number of concurrent users during peak hours.

components.label: info alert
components.content: Number of peak concurrent users cannot be greater than total number of users per month.

components.label: Days in weekend
components.description: Number of working days in a weekend.

components.header: Total days in a week can not exceed 7 days.
components.label: total days alert
